---
name: Infra / Deploy
about: Infrastructure work such as build config, CI/CD, deployment
title: "[Infra] "
labels: infra
assignees: ""
---

### Target of Change
> Specify what is being changed: Vite build config, CI/CD, deployment environment, environment variables, etc.

### Reason for Change
> Why is this change needed?

### Scope of Impact
> Which build/deployment environments are affected?

### Rollback Plan
> How to revert if something goes wrong.

### Checklist
- [ ] Verified in staging environment
- [ ] Shared with the team
